news.t: High-Yield REITs Are Still On The Mat, But It's Time For A Rebound
Why REITs Are Set To Bounce In 2025
How To Crush S&P 500, Double Your Dividend Payouts
These Steady 8% Dividends Are Trading Like Its 2019
Wall Street is divided on the outlook for US house prices. Here's what 6 experts have recently said.
It's time to buy REITS to hedge against inflation, even though the real estate sector has struggled so far this year, says investment research firm
‘Wealth Creation Through Housing Is Not Guaranteed': Here Are the Most Overvalued Housing Markets in America
What it takes to make money flipping homes in a crazy real estate market
Econofact: Where are house prices rising the most? And why are they going up so fast?
George Soros warns that the country's troubled real estate industry could devastate its economy

holdings.infoBox: RWR is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Prologis stock at 10.04%, Welltower at 9.42%, Simon Property Group at 4.65%, Equinix at 4.47%, and Public Storage at 4.38%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Dow Jones REIT ETF (RWR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones U.S. Select REIT Capped index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of firms involved in the ownership and operation of commercial, residential, healthcare, and other real estate. RWR was launched on Apr 23, 2001 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: Dow Jones U.S. Select REIT Capped Index
